---
title: "Immune repertoire plots"
format: html
---

```{python}
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, "..")

import importlib.util
_spec = importlib.util.spec_from_file_location("mock_data", "00_mock_data.py")
_m = importlib.util.module_from_spec(_spec); _spec.loader.exec_module(_m)

rep_df  = _m.make_mock_repertoire(n_cells=600, n_clonotypes=80, n_samples=4, seed=42)
adata   = _m.make_mock_anndata(n_cells=500, n_genes=50, seed=42)
```

## `plot_clonotype_abundance` — per sample

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_clonotype_abundance

p_abund = plot_clonotype_abundance(
    rep_df, clonotype_col="clonotype_id",
    sample_col="sample", top_n=20,
    title="Top-20 clonotypes by abundance",
)
p_abund
```

## `plot_clonotype_overlap` — Jaccard heatmap

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_clonotype_overlap

result = plot_clonotype_overlap(
    rep_df, clonotype_col="clonotype_id", sample_col="sample",
    method="jaccard", title="Jaccard clonotype overlap",
)
result.plot
```

The overlap matrix (diagonal = 1, symmetric):

```{python}
result.matrix.round(3)
```

## `plot_clonotype_embedding` alongside `plot_umap`

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_umap

# Plain UMAP for comparison
p_umap = plot_umap(adata, color="cluster", title="UMAP — cluster")
p_umap
```

```{python}
from ggnomics import plot_clonotype_embedding

p_clono = plot_clonotype_embedding(
    adata, clonotype_col="clonotype_id", dimred="X_umap",
    title="UMAP — clonotype expansion",
)
p_clono
```
